blocks.name: 01_foundation
blocks.task: Generate implementation phases ONLY for foundation/bootstrap: directory layout, configuration, constants, preflight checks, core scripts, validators, state management. Output JSON: {"phases": [...], "deferred_to_v2": [...]}.

blocks.name: 02_core_components
blocks.task: Generate implementation phases ONLY for the core component scripts defined in the architecture. Cover each script's creation, its inputs/outputs, and integration points. Output JSON: {"phases": [...], "deferred_to_v2": [...]}.

blocks.name: 03_orchestration_and_gates
blocks.task: Generate implementation phases ONLY for orchestration, runtime flow, gate handling, error handling, rollback, and state promotion. Output JSON: {"phases": [...], "deferred_to_v2": [...]}.

blocks.name: 04_entrypoints_and_integration
blocks.task: Generate implementation phases ONLY for CLI entrypoints, operator workflows, external integrations (Telegram if applicable), and auth/access handling. Output JSON: {"phases": [...], "deferred_to_v2": [...]}.

blocks.name: 05_testing_and_validation
blocks.task: Generate implementation phases ONLY for testing, integration tests, end-to-end validation, rollout sequencing, and the consolidated deferred_to_v2 list. Output JSON: {"phases": [...], "deferred_to_v2": [...]}.
